identity.name: Mercat de la Boqueria
identity.address: La Rambla, 91, Ciutat Vella, 08001 Barcelona, Spain

discovery.text: Verified for Las Ramblas: Mercat de la Boqueria is directly on La Rambla and remains one of the promenade’s defining edge institutions.

narrative.summary: The market hall that turns La Rambla from promenade into urban interior.
